description: Interlinked regulation of metabolic rate (T3), androgen signaling and dopamine tone. T3 increases dopamine synthesis and androgen receptor expression; androgens modulate dopamine; dopamine supports hypothalamic drive.

labs: TSH, FT3, FT4, rT3, prolactin, total T, free T, SHBG, cortisol
